creator: rleigh@codelibre.net
text:
Looks similar to the (fixed) #195961, after fetching:

Checking integrity...Assertion failed: (strcmp(uid, p->uid) != 0), function pkg_conflicts_check_local_path, file pkg_jobs_conflicts.c, line 398.

There's also an sqlite UPDATE failure, which might be a second issue (switching from automake14 to automake):

pkg: sqlite error while executing UPDATE packages SET name=?1  WHERE name=?2; in file pkg_jobs.c:1729: UNIQUE constraint failed: packages.name

This is a current FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE system (dating back to 10.0-RELEASE, so might have some historical stuff in the package db?):
# uname -a
FreeBSD ome-ci-bsd-01 11.0-RELEASE-p2 FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p2 #0: Mon Oct 24 06:55:27 UTC 2016     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
# freebsd-version
11.0-RELEASE-p6
pkg --version
1.9.4

Kind regards,
Roger


Upgrade transcript:
